response.justification: Despite extensive experience in distributed systems, open-source leadership, and full-stack development, the candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience and 5 years of cloud compute platform infrastructure work; their C++ exposure is limited to academic and minor projects, and their professional work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of large-scale cloud infrastructure ownership or technical leadership in cloud compute.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source projects and developer mentoring
Strong background in distributed systems and high-performance applications
Extensive experience across multiple tech stacks and DevOps practices
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience — far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable cloud compute platform leadership or architecture experience
Primary technologies are web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not cloud infrastructure or compute systems
